understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the '+' goal gem tile, which lies deeper in the level in the direction of gravity (downward). I had to descend through layers by using a combination of horizontal moves and clicking breakable blocks ('x') to open fall paths.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal movement (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT) shifts the character sideways, and after each move gravity (DOWN here) pulls me to the next solid surface. Landing on spikes ('u'/'v') ends the game. CLICK removes individual 'x' (breakable) tiles in the grid without ending the turn's gravity fall. I could see landing positions from each possible horizontal move via structured state. I used CLICKs to clear a column of blocks (5,12; 5,9; 2,16; 3,16) so that horizontal moves would let gravity pull me deeper through passages. After clearing paths, moving into those columns caused me to fall further downward toward the goal.
